name: Performance Profiler
description: Analyze code for performance bottlenecks and optimization opportunities

agents.name: Perf Analyzer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the code for performance issues. Look for: N+1 queries, unnecessary allocations, blocking operations, missing indexes, inefficient algorithms, and memory leaks. Benchmark critical paths.

agents.name: Optimization Advisor
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a performance report with: identified bottlenecks ranked by impact, specific optimization recommendations with code examples, expected improvement estimates, trade-offs of each optimization, and benchmarking suggestions.

author: agentfactory
